name: Water and Sewerage Utility Capital Contributions

eligibility.description: Must be a regulated public utility providing water or sewerage services; must expend the amount on tangible property within two taxable years and maintain accurate records.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Regulated water and sewerage disposal utilities can exclude contributions in aid of construction (CIAC) from gross income if the funds are used for tangible property construction.
